name: Packmind MCP Server — Technical Decisions Knowledge Base
what_it_does: MCP server for Packmind — a platform that captures, scales, and enforces organizational technical decisions and coding standards. Enables AI agents to access and enforce your organization's documented technical patterns, architectural decisions, and coding conventions across codebases.
use_cases: Enforcing organizational coding standards and technical patterns from code review agents
Retrieving documented architectural decisions from engineering knowledge agents
Checking proposed code changes against team technical conventions from AI coding agents
Distributing and enforcing technical knowledge across engineering teams via AI
not_for: Teams without documented technical decisions in Packmind
General code quality checking without organization-specific rules
Replacing code linters (higher-level architectural pattern enforcement)
best_when: An engineering team uses Packmind to document technical decisions and wants AI coding agents (like Cursor or Claude Code) to automatically enforce those decisions — keeping codebases aligned with team standards.
avoid_when: You haven't documented your technical decisions. Packmind MCP is only valuable if your team actively maintains a Packmind knowledge base.

auth.notes: Packmind API key required. Technical decisions are organization-specific — access control is important to prevent unauthorized modification.

pricing.notes: Packmind has free and paid tiers. MCP server integration available. Enterprise tier for larger organizations.

known_agent_gotchas: Knowledge base quality depends entirely on team's documentation discipline in Packmind
Technical decisions may conflict — agents must handle ambiguous or outdated guidelines
Organizational code standards are sensitive IP — restrict external agent access
Packmind must be kept current or agents will enforce stale patterns
Agent-enforced standards need human review loop — automated enforcement may be too aggressive
agent_readiness.security_notes: Organizational technical decisions are sensitive IP. Restrict access to internal agents only. API key protection. Code patterns should not be exposed externally.

security_score_components.security_notes: Proprietary engineering knowledge base. Technical decisions are sensitive IP. Internal use only. API key required. HTTPS.
